title: Fix SKU Pricing Popup Scroll Bug
why: Because the pricing popup used fixed coordinates calculated only once on click, scrolling the table caused the popup to detach from the SKU button, resulting in visual misalignment.
root_cause: Stale absolute coordinate tracking in React Portal during parent overflow scrolling.
solution: Replaced DOMRect with HTMLElement tracking and bound scroll event listeners (capture phase) to dynamically update the portal's position on scroll.
prevention: When using React Portals over scrolling containers, always bind scroll listeners to update position dynamically.
